calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Off Calendar

Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Recovhub, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Robert O. Divelbiss, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff EpiGrowth LLC.
Jonathan Gavenda, Founder & Owner of EpiGrowth LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Gavenda appeared via CourtCall for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Recovhub, Inc.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on May 10, 2019 and personally served on defendant Recovhub, Inc.'s Agent for Service of Process on June 10, 2019.
Default as to defendant Recovhub, Inc. was entered on July 11, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 24, 2019.

Plaintiff EpiGrowth LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: EpiGrowth Services Agreement with defendant Recovhub, Inc. dated 1/7/18....ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Invoice to defendant dated 6/7/18 for $40,185.00...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Invoice to defendant dated 7/10/18 for $39,647.40..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Invoice to defendant dated 8/7/18 for $21,755.60...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: Invoice to defendant dated 9/10/18 for $7,360.00...........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff EpiGrowth LLC, and against the defaulted defendant Recovhub, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $109,023.00. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $21,367.79.
Costs - $754.00.

Total - $131,144.79.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
